Description: This item can be opened.
Name: Gift

Description: This item can be used to store gold value.
Name: Gold Nugget

Description: This item can be used to permanently add 4 to 8 slots to your inventory.
Name: Inventory Expander

Description: This item can be used to permanently add 4 to 8 slots to your storage.
Name: Storage Expander

Description: This item can be consumed to add either 4 weeks to your standard account time or 11 days to your premium account time or 6 hours of rested time. Click the $ beside the rested time meters for info on standard and premium accounts. Right click the item and select an option to use.
Name: Time Card

Description: Complete with advanced footwear plus 100 feet of climbing rope and an assortment of cams this is a necessity for navigating canyons and steep mountainsides. Supersedes Steel Spike Hoppers.
Name: Advanced Climbing Gear

Description: Allows diving to moderate depths in lakes oceans and calm rivers. Supersedes Ocean Waders.
Name: Alkaline Resistant Diving Gear

Description: Allows the navigation of calm and shallow rivers.
Name: Bamboo Rafting Gear

Description: Specialized footware for efficiently crossing boggy terrain without sinking deep into the mud.
Name: Bog Hoppers

Description: Novice climbing gear allowing for scaling steep rock faces. Supersedes Mountaineering Boots.
Name: Climbing Shoes

Description: Necessary for exploring areas deep within the land where the stars cannot be seen and interference from magnetic ore deposits prevents normal means of navigation. Also provides help in finding precious resources. Supersedes Halcyon Ward and Fungal Inhibitor.
Name: Compass of the Forlorn

Description: The wearer of this emblem is said to embody the spirit of the dragon being able to climb glide and breathe like the beast himself. Supersedes Lungs of the Wyvern and Advanced Climbing Gear.
Name: Dragon's Will

Description: Illuminates your surroundings allowing you to enter dark dungeons.
Name: Dungeon Torch

Description: Necessary to prevent fungal infections from invading your immune system.
Name: Fungal Inhibitor

Description: Bodies of those who have travelled to the northern Halcyon waters without this trinket have returned but their souls have not.
Location: Dungeon of Rot Level 3 Boss Drop
Name: Halcyon Ward

Description: Only the bearer of a Heart of Darkness can travel on lands bereft of all life and ruled by the undead. Supersedes Dragon's Will.
Name: Heart of Darkness

Description: This item emanates an ethereal sadness from another plane of existence.
Name: Lock of Hair

Description: In addition to dehydration prevention this magical rebreather allows you to travel to incredible altitudes above the clouds. Supersedes Stillsuit.
Name: Lungs of the Wyvern

Description: The most basic of climbing gear allowing for travel on low inclination rockfaced mountains.
Name: Mountaineering Boots

Description: Chest high waterproof waders specifically resistant to the extreme salinity of the northeastern oceans. Supersedes Bamboo Rafting Gear.
Name: Ocean Waders

Description: Full body diving gear capable of protecting the wearer from coral abrasions. Supersedes Alkaline Resistant Diving Gear.
Name: Sharkskin Diving Gear

Description: Light emitting and amplifying goggles allowing travel to dungeon depths not accessible with a torch. Supersedes the Dungeon Torch.
Name: Shine Goggles

Description: Multipurpose gear ideal for crossing glaciers or climbing icy mountains. Supersedes climbing shoes.
Name: Steel Spike Crampons

Description: Combination footgear that allows you to cross both swampy and mountaineous terrain. Supersedes Steel Spike Crampons and Bog Hoppers.
Name: Steel Spike Hoppers

Description: Allows the wearer to travel long distances in arid conditions with minimal dehydration. A necessity for desert travel.
Name: Stillsuit
